description: 59 - 17-01-2025 - Meeting between Peter Mandelson and Nick Thomas-Symonds (Paymaster General and Minister for the Constitution and European Union Relations, CO)

participants.name: Meeting between Peter Mandelson and Nick Thomas-Symonds
participants.role: Paymaster General and Minister for the Constitution and European Union Relations

text:
(Paymaster General and Minister for the Constitution and European Union Relations, CO)

Subject: READOUT: MCO / Lord Mandelson 130125

From: PS Thomas Symonds Mailbox < Personal >
Date: 17/01/2025, 14:46
To: Hermione Gough1 Personal >, PSMichaelEllam Mailbox
Personal >
CC: DL EURS SCS Personal >, Lindsay Appleby
Personal ; JCS Personal JCS
Personal : JCS Personal
Dear all,

On Monday 13 January, MCO met with Lord Mandelson (incoming UK Ambassador to the UK)
alongside Michael Ellam (Second Permanent Secretary, CO). Please see a readout of the
meeting below:

STARTS
1. MCO outlined his responsibility for the EU Relations Secretariat and next steps on process

for the UK-EU Reset, looking ahead to the Europe Committee and the PM's participation at the
informal European Council on 3 February. ba

186

4
ENDS
Best Wishes,
Office of Rt Hon. Nick Thomas-Symonds MP, Paymaster General and Minister for the Cabinet 
Office (Minister for the Constitution and European Union Relations)
